title: Black Tea Mochi
description: A Lunar New Year’s treat for the skin, Black Tea Mochi fresh face mask brings the bounce to your routine, leaving skin soft, supple and wonderfully nourished.
ingredients: Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)
Prunus Amygdalus Amara Kernel Oil (Almond Essential Oil)
Camellia Sinensis Leaf Powder (Green Tea Powder)

images.alt: A textured swipe of Black Tea Mochi face mask on a light gray background. The thick, creamy beige formula is heavily speckled with crushed black tea particles throughout.

A smiling model in a yellow waffle-knit robe applies the Black Tea Mochi mask to their cheek. They hold the open container, showing the thick beige formula speckled with black tea particles, against a solid orange background.
A smiling person wearing a yellow robe applies the thick, textured Black Tea Mochi face mask to their skin against a bright orange background.
A smiling person with dark hair wears a yellow robe and touches their face, showcasing the full application and texture of the Black Tea Mochi face mask against an orange background.
A smiling person with dark hair wears a yellow robe and touches their cheeks, showcasing the full application and texture of the Black Tea Mochi face mask against an orange background.
